description: Fix review issues: uniqueIndex for project_tasks, UUID validation on path params, remove as any casts at server-client boundary.
steps: In drizzle/schema/projects.ts, import uniqueIndex from drizzle-orm/pg-core and change index('idx_project_tasks_unique') to uniqueIndex('idx_project_tasks_unique')
In app/api/tenant/projects/[id]/tasks/route.ts, add .onConflictDoNothing() to the insert and handle empty result (already linked)
Add UUID regex validation to path param id in all 3 sub-resource route files (projects/[id]/route.ts, milestones/route.ts, tasks/route.ts)
Remove as any casts in app/tenant/projects/page.tsx and app/tenant/projects/[id]/page.tsx
acceptance_criteria: projectTasks table uses uniqueIndex instead of index
POST /api/tenant/projects/[id]/tasks uses onConflictDoNothing and returns 409 if already linked
All route handlers return 400 for invalid UUID path params
No as any casts remain in frontend pages
verification: Run npx tsc --noEmit to verify no type errors
findings: All 3 review issues fixed. TypeScript compiles with 0 errors. All 430 tests pass (2 skipped DB-dependent suites as before). No new issues introduced.
